en: And he called to him his twelve disciples and gave them authority over unclean spirits, to cast them out, and to heal every disease and every affliction.
zh: 耶穌叫了十二門徒來，賜給他們勝過污靈的權柄，可以趕出污靈和醫治各種疾病、各種病症。

en: The names of the twelve apostles are these: first, Simon, who is called Peter, and Andrew his brother; James the son of Zebedee, and John his brother;
zh: 十二使徒的名字如下：為首的是西門 ，西門的弟弟安得烈，西庇太的兒子雅各，雅各的弟弟約翰，

en: Philip and Bartholomew; Thomas and Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus;
zh: 腓力，巴多羅邁，多馬，稅吏馬太，亞勒腓的兒子雅各，達太，

en: Simon the Cananaean, and Judas Iscariot, who betrayed him.
zh: 激進派的西門，和出賣耶穌的加略人猶大。

en: These twelve Jesus sent out, instructing them, "Go nowhere among the Gentiles and enter no town of the Samaritans,
zh: 耶穌差遣這十二個人出去，並且囑咐他們：“外族人的路，你們不要走，撒瑪利亞人的城，你們也不要進；

en: but go rather to the lost sheep of the house of Israel.
zh: 卻要到以色列家的迷羊那裡去。

en: And proclaim as you go, saying, 'The kingdom of heaven is at hand.'
zh: 你們要一邊走一邊宣揚說：‘天國近了。’

en: Heal the sick, raise the dead, cleanse lepers, cast out demons. You received without paying; give without pay.
zh: 要醫治有病的，叫死人復活，潔淨患痲風的，趕出污鬼。你們白白地得來，也應當白白地給人。

en: Acquire no gold nor silver nor copper for your belts,
zh: 你們腰袋裡不要帶金、銀、銅錢；

en: no bag for your journey, nor two tunics nor sandals nor a staff, for the laborer deserves his food.
zh: 路上不要帶行囊，也不要帶兩件衣裳，不要帶鞋或手杖，因為作工的理當得到供應。

en: And whatever town or village you enter, find out who is worthy in it and stay there until you depart.
zh: 你們無論進哪一座城哪一個村，都要打聽誰配接待你們，就住在那裡，直到離去。

en: As you enter the house, greet it.
zh: 到他家裡的時候，要向他們問安；

en: And if the house is worthy, let your peace come upon it, but if it is not worthy, let your peace return to you.
zh: 如果這家是配得的，你們的平安就必臨到他們；如果這家不配得，你們的平安仍歸你們。

en: And if anyone will not receive you or listen to your words, shake off the dust from your feet when you leave that house or town.
zh: 如果有人不接待你們，不聽你們的話，你們離開那一家那一城的時候，就要把腳上的灰塵跺下去。

en: Truly, I say to you, it will be more bearable on the day of judgment for the land of Sodom and Gomorrah than for that town.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，在審判的日子，所多瑪和蛾摩拉所受的，比那城還輕呢。

en: "Behold, I am sending you out as sheep in the midst of wolves, so be wise as serpents and innocent as doves.
zh: “現在，我差派你們出去，好像羊進到狼群中間；所以你們要像蛇一樣機警，像鴿子一樣純潔。

en: Beware of men, for they will deliver you over to courts and flog you in their synagogues,
zh: 你們要小心，因為有人要把你們送交公議會，並要在會堂裡鞭打你們；

en: and you will be dragged before governors and kings for my sake, to bear witness before them and the Gentiles.
zh: 你們為我的緣故，也要被帶到統治者和君王面前，向他們和外族人作見證。

en: When they deliver you over, do not be anxious how you are to speak or what you are to say, for what you are to say will be given to you in that hour.
zh: 你們被捕的時候，用不著擔心說甚麼和怎麼說，因為那時你們必得著當說的話；

en: For it is not you who speak, but the Spirit of your Father speaking through you.
zh: 因為說話的不是你們，而是你們的父的靈，是他在你們裡面說話。

en: Brother will deliver brother over to death, and the father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death,
zh: 弟兄要出賣弟兄，父親要出賣兒女，甚至把他們置於死地；兒女要悖逆父母，害死他們。

en: and you will be hated by all for my name's sake. But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
zh: 你們為我的名，要被眾人恨惡，然而堅忍到底的必然得救。

en: When they persecute you in one town, flee to the next, for truly, I say to you, you will not have gone through all the towns of Israel before the Son of Man comes.
zh: 如果有人在這城迫害你們，就逃到別的城去。我實在告訴你們，你們還沒有走遍以色列的各城，人子就來到了。

en: "A disciple is not above his teacher, nor a servant above his master.
zh: “學生不能勝過老師，奴僕也不能勝過主人。

en: It is enough for the disciple to be like his teacher, and the servant like his master. If they have called the master of the house Beelzebul, how much more will they malign those of his household.
zh: 學生若能像老師一樣，奴僕若能像主人一樣，也就夠了。如果一家之主也被稱為別西卜 ，何況他的家人呢？

en: "So have no fear of them, for nothing is covered that will not be revealed, or hidden that will not be known.
zh: “所以不要怕他們。沒有甚麼掩蓋的事不被揭露，也沒有甚麼祕密是人不知道的。

en: What I tell you in the dark, say in the light, and what you hear whispered, proclaim on the housetops.
zh: 我在暗處告訴你們的，你們要在明處講出來；你們聽見的耳語，要在房頂上宣揚出來。

en: And do not fear those who kill the body but cannot kill the soul. Rather fear him who can destroy both soul and body in hell.
zh: 那些殺身體卻不能殺靈魂的，不要怕他們；倒要怕那位能把靈魂和身體都投入地獄裡的。

en: Are not two sparrows sold for a penny? And not one of them will fall to the ground apart from your Father.
zh: 兩隻麻雀不是賣一個大錢嗎？但你們的父若不許可，一隻也不會掉在地上。

en: But even the hairs of your head are all numbered.
zh: 甚至你們的頭髮都一一數過了。

en: Fear not, therefore; you are of more value than many sparrows.
zh: 所以不要怕，你們比許多麻雀貴重得多呢。

en: So everyone who acknowledges me before men, I also will acknowledge before my Father who is in heaven,
zh: “凡在人面前承認我的，我在我天父面前也要承認他；

en: but whoever denies me before men, I also will deny before my Father who is in heaven.
zh: 在人面前不認我的，我在我天父面前也要不認他。

en: "Do not think that I have come to bring peace to the earth. I have not come to bring peace, but a sword.
zh: “你們不要以為我來了，是要給地上帶來和平；我並沒有帶來和平，卻帶來刀劍，

en: For I have come to set a man against his father, and a daughter against her mother, and a daughter-in-law against her mother-in-law.
zh: 因為我來了是要叫人分裂： 人與父親作對， 女兒與母親作對， 媳婦與婆婆作對，

en: And a person's enemies will be those of his own household.
zh: 人的仇敵就是自己的家人。

en: Whoever loves father or mother more than me is not worthy of me, and whoever loves son or daughter more than me is not worthy of me.
zh: 愛父母過於愛我的，不配作屬我的；愛兒女過於愛我的，不配作屬我的；

en: And whoever does not take his cross and follow me is not worthy of me.
zh: 凡不背起自己的十字架來跟從我的，也不配作屬我的。

en: Whoever finds his life will lose it, and whoever loses his life for my sake will find it.
zh: 顧惜自己生命的，必要喪掉生命；但為我犧牲生命的，必要得著生命。

en: "Whoever receives you receives me, and whoever receives me receives him who sent me.
zh: “接待你們的，就是接待我；接待我的，就是接待那差我來的。

en: The one who receives a prophet because he is a prophet will receive a prophet's reward, and the one who receives a righteous person because he is a righteous person will receive a righteous person's reward.
zh: 因先知的名接待先知的，必得先知所得的賞賜；因義人的名接待義人的，必得義人所得的賞賜。

en: And whoever gives one of these little ones even a cup of cold water because he is a disciple, truly, I say to you, he will by no means lose his reward."
zh: 無論誰因門徒的名，只把一杯涼水給這些微不足道的人中的一個喝，我實在告訴你們，他決不會得不到他的賞賜。”
